uk.levelLabel: VK-waarschuwing geldt voor delen van het land, niet landelijk — zie regionale risico’s.
uk.updateNote: Updated information on land border crossings with Colombia and Peru ('Entry requirements' page).

ca.levelLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution

ie.updateNote: On 9 August 2023, a candidate for the 20 August Presidential elections was killed in Quito. A 60-day state of emergency for the whole country was introduced on 10 August 2023. Travelers to Ecuador should avoid protests and political gatherings.

fr.levelLabel: Geen herkenbare niveau-formulering gevonden in het samenvattend blok.

es.levelLabel: Niveau afgeleid uit samenvattend blok ("VIAJAR CON PRECAUCIÓN").

dk.levelLabel: Niveau afgeleid uit samenvattend blok ("ingen rejsevejledning").

au.updateNote: Still current at:11 July 2026 Updated:23 June 2026 Latest update:Ecuador is in a state of 'internal armed conflict'. The security environment may change at short notice. Monitor the media and follow the advice of local authorities (see 'Safety'). Do not travel within 20km of the border with Colombia, except the official border crossing at Tulcan, due to the high risk of kidnapping and violent crim
